node.statement: EXACT axioms: unit law and commutativity. For a in A: 1•a=P(1 o a). By def-jordan-product 1 o a = (1/2)(1*a+a*1)=a (unit is the algebra identity), so 1•a=P(a)=a since a=P(a) for a in A (def-near-fixed-algebra, A=Im P=Ker(1-P)). Hence 1•a=a EXACTLY. Commutativity: a•b=P(a o b) and b•a=P(b o a); the Jordan product is commutative a o b=b o a (def-jordan-product, (ab+ba)/2 symmetric), so a•b=P(a o b)=P(b o a)=b•a EXACTLY. No eta error in either.
